# Pagination

A page navigation component for navigating through paginated data. Built with composable sub-components for flexible layouts.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  Pagination,
  PaginationPrevTrigger,
  PaginationNextTrigger,
  PaginationItems,
  PaginationPageText,
  PaginationEllipsis,
  PaginationItem,
  PaginationContext,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Pagination` | Root container that manages pagination state |
| `PaginationPrevTrigger` | Button to go to the previous page |
| `PaginationNextTrigger` | Button to go to the next page |
| `PaginationItems` | Renders the page number buttons automatically |
| `PaginationItem` | Individual page number button |
| `PaginationPageText` | Displays current page information as text |
| `PaginationEllipsis` | Ellipsis indicator for skipped page numbers |
| `PaginationContext` | Context for accessing pagination state programmatically |

## Props

### Pagination (Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `count` | `number` | - | Total number of items (required) |
| `pageSize` | `number` | `10` | Number of items per page |
| `page` | `number` | - | Controlled current page number |
| `defaultPage` | `number` | `1` | Initial page for uncontrolled usage |
| `onPageChange` | `(details: { page: number }) => void` | - | Callback when the page changes |
| `siblingCount` | `number` | `1` | Number of page buttons to show on each side of the current page |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

### PaginationPageText

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `format` | `"compact" \| "long"` | `"compact"` | Display format for the page text |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Pagination count={100} pageSize={10} defaultPage={1}>
  <PaginationPrevTrigger>
    <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Previous</Button>
  </PaginationPrevTrigger>
  <PaginationItems />
  <PaginationNextTrigger>
    <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Next</Button>
  </PaginationNextTrigger>
</Pagination>
```

### With page text

```jsx
<Pagination count={200} pageSize={20} defaultPage={1}>
  <PaginationPrevTrigger>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Prev</Button>
  </PaginationPrevTrigger>
  <PaginationPageText />
  <PaginationNextTrigger>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Next</Button>
  </PaginationNextTrigger>
</Pagination>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [page, setPage] = useState(1);

<Pagination
  count={500}
  pageSize={25}
  page={page}
  onPageChange={(details) => setPage(details.page)}
>
  <PaginationPrevTrigger>
    <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Prev</Button>
  </PaginationPrevTrigger>
  <PaginationItems />
  <PaginationNextTrigger>
    <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Next</Button>
  </PaginationNextTrigger>
</Pagination>
```

### Using PaginationContext

```jsx
<Pagination count={100} pageSize={10}>
  <PaginationContext>
    {(api) => (
      <Text>Currently on page {api.page} of {api.totalPages}</Text>
    )}
  </PaginationContext>
  <PaginationPrevTrigger>
    <Button size="sm">Prev</Button>
  </PaginationPrevTrigger>
  <PaginationItems />
  <PaginationNextTrigger>
    <Button size="sm">Next</Button>
  </PaginationNextTrigger>
</Pagination>
```

## Features

- Automatically calculates total pages from `count` and `pageSize`
- Supports controlled and uncontrolled page state
- `PaginationItems` automatically renders page buttons with ellipsis for large page counts
- Configurable sibling count for visible page numbers
- `PaginationContext` provides access to pagination state for custom rendering
- `PaginationPageText` for compact text-based page display
- Prev/Next triggers use `asChild` for flexible button customization
- Forwards refs on all sub-components
